summary: Excellent audience recording with crystal‑clear sound and great sense of space, though no specific show details were noted.
review: The reviewer praises this FLAC audience tape as an outstanding capture—clean, well‑balanced, and full of ambience—making it a top alternative to other versions of the concert. No comments on the musical performance are provided, so the analysis focuses on the superb recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: One highly positive review emphasizes excellent audience sound; lack of show commentary limits confidence and lowers the overall rating despite the perfect recording score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clean transfer, wonderful sense of space, clear and well‑balanced sound throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on the set or pacing were provided in the review.
